nav.description: NAV totals + exec stats with anomaly guard

runtime_diagnostics.description: Veto counters, exit pipeline, liveness (updated_ts required)

engine_metadata.description: Engine version/build metadata for dashboards and preflight checks

router_health.description: Router slippage/latency/TWAP stats with global & per-symbol quality scores

symbol_scores.description: Hybrid scores with router/vol modifiers and factor diagnostics metadata

factor_diagnostics.description: Normalized factor surface with covariance/IR, orthogonalization, weights, attribution

edge_insights.description: Research-only snapshot aggregating factor, symbol, category edge metrics

episode_ledger.description: Completed trade cycles derived from execution logs — read-only observability

fields.episodes: Array of completed Episode objects with entry/exit/pnl/fees/duration
fields.last_rebuild_ts: ISO timestamp of last ledger rebuild
fields.stats: Aggregate stats: total_net_pnl, win_rate, avg_duration, exit_reasons

meta_scheduler.description: Slow-timescale meta-learning overlays for factors, conviction, and categories

alpha_router_state.description: Dynamic capital allocation based on health, regime, and meta signals

fields.smoothed: bool - whether EMA smoothing was applied

universe_optimizer.description: Dynamic symbol whitelist curator based on edge, category, meta, health signals

fields.allowed_symbols: List[str] - symbols allowed in active universe
fields.symbol_scores: Dict[str, float] - composite scores per symbol
fields.category_scores: Dict[str, float] - aggregated scores per category
fields.effective_max_size: int - max size after regime adjustments
fields.notes: List[str] - diagnostic notes for this update cycle

alpha_miner.description: Autonomous alpha miner (Prospector) scanning all exchange symbols for universe expansion candidates

fields.cycle_count: int - number of miner cycles run
fields.candidates: List[Candidate] - top scored candidates for universe expansion
fields.ema_scores: Dict[str, float] - EMA-smoothed scores per symbol

cross_pair_edges.description: Cross-pair statistical arbitrage engine (Crossfire) producing pair-level edge scores

fields.cycle_count: int - number of crossfire cycles run
fields.pair_edges: Dict[str, PairEdge] - edge scores and stats per pair key (e.g. BTCUSDT-ETHUSDT)
fields.ema_scores: Dict[str, float] - EMA-smoothed edge scores per pair

sentinel_x.description: Sentinel-X hybrid ML market regime classifier producing regime probabilities and hard labels

fields.cycle_count: int - number of Sentinel-X cycles run
fields.primary_regime: str - main regime label (TREND_UP, TREND_DOWN, MEAN_REVERT, BREAKOUT, CHOPPY, CRISIS)
fields.secondary_regime: str|null - secondary regime if probability > threshold
fields.features: Dict[str, float] - extracted market features (returns_mean, trend_slope, etc.)
fields.crisis_flag: bool - true if crisis override is active
fields.crisis_reason: str - reason for crisis override if active

regime_pressure.description: Regime Pressure Dashboard - OBSERVATIONAL ONLY metrics showing market pressure without affecting decisions
regime_pressure.warning: These metrics must NEVER be used to gate entries, size trades, alter exits, or modify regime logic

fields.current.dwell_time_hours: float - hours since last regime change
fields.pressure.confidence_velocity: float - EMA-smoothed Δ confidence per cycle
fields.pressure.near_flip_count_24h: int - times confidence was in [0.45, 0.55] band
fields.churn.regime_changes_24h: int - regime changes in last 24 hours
fields.churn.regime_changes_7d: int - regime changes in last 7 days
fields.churn.avg_dwell_time_hours_7d: float - average regime dwell time over 7 days
fields.meta.cycles_observed: int - confidence readings in history buffer

alpha_decay.description: Alpha Decay & Survival Curves (Thanatos) - mortality model for alpha half-life and survival probabilities

fields.cycle_count: int - number of alpha decay cycles run
fields.symbols: Dict[str, SymbolDecayStats] - per-symbol decay rate, half-life, survival/deterioration probs
fields.categories: Dict[str, CategoryDecayStats] - per-category aggregated decay stats
fields.factors: Dict[str, FactorDecayStats] - per-factor decay and weight multipliers
fields.avg_symbol_survival: float - average survival probability across symbols
fields.avg_category_survival: float - average survival probability across categories
fields.avg_factor_survival: float - average survival probability across factors
fields.weakest_symbols: List[str] - symbols with lowest survival probability
fields.strongest_symbols: List[str] - symbols with highest survival probability
fields.weakest_categories: List[str] - categories with lowest survival probability
fields.weakest_factors: List[str] - factors with lowest survival probability
fields.meta: Dict - sentinel regime, universe size, config echoes

cerberus_state.description: Cerberus Multi-Strategy Portfolio Router - dynamic head multipliers for strategy families

fields.cycle_count: int - number of Cerberus cycles run
fields.head_state: Dict[str, HeadMetrics] - per-head multipliers, EMA scores, signal components
fields.avg_decay_survival: float - average alpha decay survival probability

hydra_state.description: Hydra Multi-Strategy Execution Engine - per-head budgets, usage, and merged intents

fields.head_budgets: Dict[str, float] - effective NAV budget per head
fields.head_usage: Dict[str, float] - NAV actually used per head
fields.head_positions: Dict[str, int] - position count per head
fields.merged_intents: List[Dict] - merged symbol intents with head contributions

hydra_pnl.description: Hydra PnL Attribution - per-head equity, drawdown, kill-switches, throttle scales

fields.heads: Dict[str, HeadPnlStats] - per-head equity, drawdown, win_rate, throttle_scale

execution_quality.description: Minotaur Execution Engine - per-symbol slippage, fill quality, regime stats

fields.symbols: Dict[str, QualityStats] - per-symbol avg/p95/max slippage, fill_ratio, twap_usage

execution_alpha.description: Execution Alpha Engine - per-fill, per-symbol, per-head execution drag and alpha attribution

fields.symbols: Dict[str, AlphaStats] - per-symbol cum_alpha_usd, avg_alpha_bps, p95/p99, regime breakdown
fields.heads: Dict[str, HeadAlphaStats] - per-head alpha attribution and suggested multipliers
